public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as moving shrine tender.
appearance: Ritual garments, symbolic tokens, and carefully maintained devotional detail make the role legible at a glance.
manner: Carries devotional seriousness shaped by rite, memory, and public expectation. In Nomdara Caravan, that reads as someone adaptable, mobile, and transactionally warm, always reading routes, people, and changing terms, and the habits of a moving shrine tender still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of moving shrine tender in and around Panim Pilgrim Escort Lane, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Panim Pilgrim Escort Lane workable through the obligations of moving shrine tender while managing the immediate pressure of route danger in Nomdara Caravan.
hidden_pressure: Must ensure that rite remains trustworthy even when civic pressure tries to convert it into mere administration. Around Panim Pilgrim Escort Lane, that usually means carrying route danger, whirlpool and weather risk, dependency on negotiated access without letting the role of moving shrine tender visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Vivan Waycord needs discreet aid to prevent a ritual lapse, desecration, or public crisis of trust around Panim Pilgrim Escort Lane.
Vivan Waycord may ask the party to retrieve someone, something, or some truth before a rite can proceed safely.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained. Appearance extended under V28_8 from role/locality/public-signal derivation rather than decorative fabrication.
public_signal: Ritual dress, offering marks, and devotional cadence make Vivan Waycord immediately legible as a spiritual intermediary.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Panim Pilgrim Escort Lane: shrines, cathedrals, funerary halls, or ritual precincts
